title: 3 Reasons On Why I Like CDW Corporation
text: CDW Corporation is a leading provider of IT solutions, with diversification and strong recent performance suggesting signs of stabilization. The company operates as a middleman in the IT ecosystem, serving over 250,000 customers, which reduces dependency on a few clients. CDW has outperformed its industry and the S&P 500, with potential for growth in the fragmented IT market.

title: CDW's Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Decrease Y/Y
text: CDW's second-quarter performance is affected due to weakness across Corporate and Small Business segments.

title: CDW Corporation (CDW) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: CDW (CDW) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for CDW (CDW) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: CDW (CDW) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: CDW (CDW) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.56 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.34 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.49 per share a year ago.

title: CDW Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.59 Per Share
text: VERNON HILLS, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW), a leading multi-brand provider of information technology solutions to business, government, education and healthcare customers in the United States, the United Kingdom and Canada, today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.59 per common share to be paid on September 12, 2023 to all stockholders of record as of the close of business on August 25, 2023.
